failure.diagnosis: LoadGeneratorHosts synthesized 17244 decoded UserData bytes, exceeding the EC2 16384-byte decoded limit by 860 bytes.
failure.rawAwsError: LoadGeneratorHostsLaunchTemplateD1280896 CREATE_FAILED: User data is limited to 16384 bytes. (Service: AmazonEC2; Status Code: 400; Error Code: InvalidUserData.Malformed; Request ID: 856f28e6-0f34-470d-a85a-4d07bf2b7f71)

fix.applied: Use a Phase 7-only Brotli-compressed second-stage bootstrap while preserving the exact oha worker bytes; synth-test all five LaunchTemplate UserData values at 16384 bytes and the load generator at 15360 bytes.

failure.diagnosis: The immutable runner retained superseded hard-coded campaign thresholds of 35 USD operational and 40 USD maximum. The fresh deterministic cost model correctly passed the 45 USD new-work stop, 50 USD hard cap, and 5 USD cleanup reserve at 43.855718 USD including cleanup, but the stale deploy gate denied admission.

fix.applied: Replace the stale literals with explicit 45 USD new-work, 50 USD hard-cap, and 5 USD cleanup-reserve constants; require operational exposure below 45, maximum exposure at or below 50, and at least 5 reserve; add a regression test for the exact campaign contract.

failure.diagnosis: CloudFormation created the ClickHouse and Collector ECS services before their cluster capacity-provider associations completed. Both services referenced capacity providers without explicit dependencies on the matching association or host ASG, then the Collector deployment circuit breaker failed.
failure.rawAwsError: CollectorService16EB6072 CREATE_FAILED: Resource handler returned message: Error occurred during operation 'ECS Deployment Circuit Breaker was triggered'.

fix.applied: Create each cluster capacity-provider association explicitly, make all four EC2-backed ECS services depend on the matching association and host ASG, synth-test the exact mappings, and extend exact-owned terminal cleanup for terminated instances, deleted volumes and missing ECS service tombstones.

failure.diagnosis: The explicit capacity-provider association completed, but service creation began before every expected ECS container instance was proven agent-connected, ACTIVE and assigned to the exact capacity provider. Early task-start failures reached the deployment circuit-breaker threshold during host bootstrap.
failure.rawAwsError: CollectorService16EB6072 CREATE_FAILED: Resource handler returned message: Error occurred during operation 'ECS Deployment Circuit Breaker was triggered'.

fix.applied: Require every fixed EC2 ECS host to signal local ECS agent readiness and exact API-visible capacity-provider registration, then make each ECS service depend on the matching all-host WaitCondition.

failure.diagnosis: Phase 7 retained HAProxy maxconn 65536 but omitted the ECS NOFILE ulimit. The exact pinned image and synthesized configuration exit at nofile 65535 because HAProxy requires 131132 descriptors, and start successfully at nofile 200000.
failure.rawAwsError: HaproxyServiceE1B870CD CREATE_FAILED: Resource handler returned message: "Error occurred during operation 'ECS Deployment Circuit Breaker was triggered'."

fix.applied: Set the Phase 7 HAProxy ECS container NOFILE soft and hard limits to 200000, assert the exact synthesized Ulimits, and safely untag only deleted run-owned subnet Tagging API tombstones during cleanup.

failure.diagnosis: The verifier required an internal- DNS prefix that AWS does not guarantee for an internal NLB. The live NLB had the exact synthesized LoadBalancerName, Scheme=internal, Type=network, active state, exact VPC/security group and exact Run/Session tags, but the stale string-format heuristic rejected it before the authoritative predicate.
failure.runnerError: RuntimeError: protocol destination is not the exact internal Phase 7 proxy NLB

fix.applied: Removed the DNS-prefix heuristic; require exact DNS inventory equality and the exact synthesized LoadBalancerName before the existing authoritative ELBv2 checks. Added exact-stack capacity discovery, full ownership validation, target-group delay zero, idempotent service deletion, ASG scale-to-zero, ECS inactive wait and exact deletion-race handling to cleanup.

failure.diagnosis: The LF-terminated oha worker was placed in its own userdata array element before the heredoc terminator. Joining the array with LF added a second LF, so the deployed 48340-byte worker SHA differed from the 48339-byte source SHA and the exact readiness predicate failed before TLS health.
failure.rawAwsError: AWS-RunShellScript plugin: failed to run commands: exit status 1
failure.runnerError: RuntimeError: SSM command failed without secret output: failed to run commands: exit status 1

fix.applied: Require the source worker to end in LF and combine the heredoc header, exact worker body and terminator without an added separator. Reconstruct the synthesized body and require exact bytes/SHA. Add the NAT gateway public IPv4 price to the fresh deterministic cost model.

failure.diagnosis: The local Prometheus parser rejected the standards-compliant HAProxy sample haproxy_process_current_zlib_memory NaN before it could evaluate the required finite HAProxy acceptance metrics. The prior exact-worker fix passed on all eight generators.
failure.runnerError: RuntimeError: invalid Prometheus sample: haproxy_process_current_zlib_memory NaN

fix.applied: Accept exact Prometheus NaN, +Inf and -Inf tokens, preserve them in parsed exposition, enforce finite selected acceptance metrics, and reject every non-finite pure-evaluator input with fail-closed latency handling.

cost.reason: No image preparation, image-stack deployment, runtime deployment or workload stage started.

failure.diagnosis: A read-only predeploy audit found that the final evaluator still enforced superseded 35/40 USD limits. The source-bound readiness chain was invalidated before image preparation when the evaluator was aligned with the active 55/60 USD contract.

fix.applied: Import the 55 USD new-work stop, 60 USD hard cap and 5 USD cleanup reserve from the deterministic cost model in the final evaluator and add exact boundary regressions.

failure.diagnosis: CDK hashed the 1237-byte haproxyConfigText without a trailing LF, while the shell heredoc wrote one mandatory trailing LF. Both live HAProxy hosts therefore reported the deterministic 1238-byte SHA-256 557bc67cd9b4bb10e582c2e3f1425ee0ca57dee51b78dc57f739259f4e21c4b9 instead of the published ccf793450f286f1b02bded7b61a2bac3318fc9e42783c35138ba5b2aeec8553f.
failure.runnerError: RuntimeError: HAProxy runtime config hash differs from the CDK output

fix.applied: Create one UTF-8 Buffer from the HAProxy configuration, derive both Base64 and SHA-256 from that Buffer, decode the payload directly to the runtime file, and synth-test exact payload/hash equality while retaining every LaunchTemplate UserData limit.

failure.diagnosis: The exact 1237-byte HAProxy configuration ended with byte 112 instead of LF. All six owned HAProxy tasks exited 1, and the same pinned image reproduced Missing LF on last line and a fatal configuration error.
failure.rawAwsError: ECS Deployment Circuit Breaker was triggered for HaproxyServiceE1B870CD
failure.runnerError: deploy watchdog exit 124 after CloudFormation reported the HAProxy ECS circuit breaker and rolled the stack back

fix.applied: Retain exactly one terminal LF in the canonical HAProxy UTF-8 Buffer, keep Base64 and the published SHA-256 derived from that same Buffer, and regression-test the exact final bytes.

failure.diagnosis: The exact HAProxy 3.2.4 Prometheus document was 50,342 bytes, while SSM StandardOutputContent returned only its first 24,000 bytes. The required aggregated backend status started at byte 31,042, so verification saw zero matching samples even though both SSM commands, both runtime config hashes, all eight TLS/HTTP2 health checks and the deployment itself succeeded.
failure.rawAwsError: RuntimeError: expected one Prometheus sample for haproxy_backend_agg_server_status/{'proxy': 'collectors', 'state': 'UP'}
failure.runnerError: verify exited 1 and triggered the immutable hard-stop cleanup path

fix.applied: Filter the remote HAProxy Prometheus stream to the three metric families consumed by correctness and score observability before SSM captures stdout, with a regression document whose required metric begins after 24,000 bytes.

failure.diagnosis: The successful SSM command returned a multi-line aggregate, but the runner parsed only its final closing brace. The recovered aggregate was 0 HTTP 202 and 1,000 non-202 because every AWS HTTP correctness fixture also contained collector-forbidden producer_sent_at. Direct Kinesis and replacement work never started.
failure.rawAwsError: SSM Status=Success ResponseCode=0 StandardOutput={http202:0,non202:1000,total:1000}; runner raised json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
failure.runnerError: correctness exited 1 and triggered the immutable hard-stop cleanup path

fix.applied: Parse complete SSM JSON, emit compact bounded-curl aggregate output, persist a non-secret HTTP receipt before validation, and remove producer_sent_at and run_id from the exact collector-facing HTTP fixture.

failure.diagnosis: The Phase 7 JavaScript hostname-shape validator required an internal- DNS prefix, but live exact ELBv2 verification proved the returned prefixless DNS name belonged to the run-owned Scheme=internal network load balancer. Warmup stopped before any worker or traffic start.
failure.rawAwsError: None. AWS deployment and exact live ELBv2 verification passed; the local orchestrator rejected the returned DNS shape before traffic start.
failure.runnerError: Error: unexpected Phase 7 protocol NLB DNS name; RuntimeError: warmup orchestration failed

fix.applied: Allow both exact AWS-emitted Phase 7 proxy NLB hostname forms, with and without the internal- prefix, while retaining the exact proxy name, 11-digit stamp, lowercase hash and Seoul ELB suffix. Keep authoritative internal scheme and run ownership in live deployment verification.

failure.diagnosis: The archive task overlapped the score window exactly once. The Phase 7 ClickHouse container was capped at 5120 MiB and max_server_memory_usage at 5261334937 bytes while the archive query could use 4831838208 bytes. Concurrent ingestion/merge and Parquet re-read reached the 4.90 GiB server cap, so COMMITTED could not be produced or re-read and source DROP remained forbidden.
failure.rawAwsError: ClickHouse HTTP 500: Code 241 MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED; would use 4.68 GiB while attempting 5.04 MiB, current RSS 4.90 GiB, maximum 4.90 GiB.
failure.runnerError: Error: archive task failed with exit code 1; RuntimeError: score orchestration failed

fix.applied: Increase only Phase 7 ClickHouse container memory to 8192 MiB and server memory to 7516192768 bytes while retaining the 4831838208-byte archive query limit, r7g.2xlarge, EBS, CPU and Phase 6 settings.

failure.diagnosis: All eight one-shot SSM load commands completed successfully, but all eight local result observers terminated on transient SSM endpoint connect/read timeouts because the polling helper retried only OAuth2 rate-limit errors. Promise.all surfaced node 08 first. Worker artifacts and the aggregate warmup summary were not recovered, so acceptance remained untrustworthy.
failure.rawAwsError: Connect timeout on endpoint URL: https://ssm.ap-northeast-2.amazonaws.com/; nodes 03, 05 and 06 reported the equivalent read timeout.
failure.runnerError: Error: node-08 oha invocation failed with 1; RuntimeError: warmup orchestration failed

fix.applied: Keep SendCommand exactly one-shot. Add absolute-deadline bounded exponential backoff and jitter only to read-only GetCommandInvocation and exact S3-to-local artifact recovery, persist transient retry evidence, use short CLI timeouts only for those reads and fail credentials, authorization, validation and unknown errors immediately.

acceptanceDeviation.diagnosis: Warmup completed 8,999,999 of 9,000,000 requests with one timeout. HTTP 429 and 5xx were zero and accounting was exact at 8,999,999, so diagnostic continuation was allowed but strict acceptance permanently failed.

failure.diagnosis: The earlier 8 GiB container and 7 GiB ClickHouse server fix was active, but the Phase 7 archive entrypoint retained a stale 4.5 GiB per-query cap. Parquet re-read attempted one additional 6.04 MiB allocation and hit that binding limit.
failure.evidenceLimitation: The exact Code 241 event was transcribed into the immutable diagnosis before cleanup, but a standalone raw CloudWatch event artifact was not preserved.
failure.rawAwsError: ClickHouse HTTP 500: Code 241 MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED; re-reading part-00000.parquet would use 4.50 GiB plus a 6.04 MiB allocation above the 4.50 GiB query maximum.
failure.runnerError: Error: archive task failed with exit code 1; RuntimeError: score orchestration failed

fix.applied: Raise only the Phase 7 archive per-query ClickHouse ceiling from 4.5 GiB to 5 GiB while retaining the 7 GiB server and 8 GiB container caps; add runtime and CDK memory-invariant regressions.

evidencePaths.localHandoffPolicy: AWS-first promotion-ineligible targeted diagnostic; whole Phase 7-1 handoff is deferred until the real-AWS focused fix passes.

failure.diagnosis: The targeted-only EC2 user data called blocking systemctl restart ecs from cloud-init modules:final. It did not return before rollback terminated the host, so the ECS agent never registered and no ClickHouse, seed, archive or verifier task started.
failure.rawAwsError: EC2 console: Job for ecs.service canceled; cc_scripts_user.py failed; cloud-init finished after 219.60 seconds as rollback terminated the instance.
failure.rawRunnerError: cdk deploy LoopAdPerfPhase7ArchiveDiagnosticStack exited with status 1

fix.applied: Remove the blocking restart and reuse the strict stack's ASG ResourceSignal plus exact ECS capacity-provider registration WaitCondition before creating the targeted ClickHouse service.

evidencePaths.localHandoffPolicy: AWS-first promotion-ineligible targeted diagnostic; whole Phase 7-1 handoff remains deferred until the real-AWS focused archive path passes.

failure.diagnosis: The Amazon Linux 2 ECS-optimized ARM64 AMI did not expose an aws executable. Both shared Phase 7 host readiness scripts assumed AWS CLI was present. The first script reached exact ECS registration, then failed CloudFormation SignalResource with exit status 127; the dependent capacity-provider registration signal did not start.
failure.rawRunnerError: KeyboardInterrupt while cdk deploy was waiting for an impossible readiness signal; process exit 130 after the hard stop

fix.applied: Fail closed before enabling any shared Phase 7 readiness unit unless aws is already available or yum install -y awscli succeeds; validate that bootstrap precedes both AWS calls. Catch KeyboardInterrupt as a failed verdict while retaining cleanup.

failure.diagnosis: The standard Phase 7 stack, service smoke and deterministic 15,000,000-row seed passed. The archive exported Parquet, then the exact re-read verification exceeded the archive entrypoint's 5 GiB per-query ceiling by one 6.04 MiB allocation. The 7 GiB ClickHouse server ceiling and 8 GiB container ceiling were not the binding limits.
failure.rawAwsError: ArchiveError: ClickHouse HTTP 500: Code: 241. Query memory limit exceeded: would use 5.01 GiB (attempt to allocate chunk of 6.04 MiB), maximum: 5.00 GiB: read stage: ColumnData: column properties_json ... part-00000.parquet ... ParquetV3BlockInputFormat ... ReadFromObjectStorage

fix.description: Raise the standard Phase 7 archive query ceiling from 5 GiB to a current 6 GiB operational value while validating a lower-bound/safety envelope instead of exact point equality; recursively normalize boto3 datetimes before failure-evidence persistence; untag exact-owned stopped archive tasks before deleting their ECS cluster.

failure.diagnosis: Attempt 21 successfully deployed the unchanged standard Phase 7 topology, passed minimal service/TLS/ClickHouse smoke and produced two identical deterministic fingerprints for exactly 15,000,000 source rows. The Phase 7 entrypoint supplied 6 GiB, but the inherited Phase 6 ArchiveConfig still rejected every value above 5 GiB before issuing an archive query. Attempt 20's operational-headroom fix therefore did not reach the actual archive engine validation boundary.
failure.rawAwsError: ValueError: ClickHouse query memory must be at most 5 GiB

fix.description: Allow the standard Phase 7 archive's 6 GiB query setting through the shared archive validator while preserving a 512 MiB server reserve, treat stopped ECS task tag mappings as immutable cleanup tombstones, and collect CloudWatch logs with bounded forward-token pagination.

failure.diagnosis: Immutable scoped attempt failed before runtime deploy at image-preparation: Command '['git', '-C', '/Users/sijun-yang/Documents/GitHub/krafton-jungle-project-4team/loop-ad_infra/loop-ad/perf-phase7/run_20260719_162701_phase7_integration/collector', 'cat-file', '-e', '497315137251af82d0d203ce34702d5543553942^{commit}']' returned non-zero exit status 128.
Immutable scoped attempt stopped at cleanup: inventory exited 2

budgetEpochs.closingReason: User reset all prior charged cost to zero after Attempt 18 authoritative cleanup zero.
budgetEpochs.userAuthorizationBasis: 다음 작업부터 소모 비용은 0달러로 초기화하고 새롭게 60달러 제한을 시행해주세요

budgetEpochs.closingReason: User reset all work through Attempt 22 to zero for new admission after authoritative cleanup and global inventory zero.

budgetEpochs.closingReason: User reset all work through Attempt 23 and Phase 8 promotion to zero for future admission.

entryHashDefinition: SHA-256 of UTF-8 JSON for the entry with entrySha256 omitted, keys recursively sorted, ensure_ascii=false, and separators comma/colon
